stemHtml: When a jet transport aeroplane takes off with the CG at the aft limit and the trimmable horizontal stabiliser (THS) is positioned at the maximum allowable nose down position for take-off:

options.a: rotation will require higher than normal stick force.
options.b: early nose wheel raising will take place.
options.c: there will be a tendency to under-rotate.
options.d: rotation will be normal using the normal rotation technique.
